description: A faithful Codex pet recreation of a shy long-haired gray stray cat with heavy face-covering bangs, one warm yellow eye, a brass bell collar, an old side pouch, and a huge fluffy tail.

idle.notes: Quiet standing idle with tiny blink, tiny fur sway, and gentle breathing.

walk.notes: True directional cautious walk rows used for movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Shy-but-curious listen and look loop with a slight head lift and more visible yellow eye.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased loop with a small paw raise and softer relaxed posture.

sleep.notes: Curled sleeping loop with closed eyes and tail wrapped around the body and face.

explore.notes: In-place scout loop with careful sniffing and tiny searching steps, not literal sprinting.

groom.notes: Fixed-atlas jumping row intentionally remapped to a seated grooming loop.

shy.notes: Fixed-atlas failed row intentionally remapped to a timid cower-and-recover loop.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true left-facing and right-facing walk rows.

explore.notes: Fixed atlas running row was intentionally remapped to an in-place scout loop.

groom.notes: Fixed atlas jumping row was intentionally remapped to a grooming loop.

shy.notes: Fixed atlas failed row was intentionally remapped to a timid cower loop.

curl_sleep.notes: No dedicated extra row remained in the fixed atlas, so curl_sleep is approximated by the main curled sleep loop.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
left-facing row keeps head, bangs, visible eye, pouch, body, and tail aligned left
right-facing row keeps head, bangs, visible eye, pouch, body, and tail aligned right
heavy face-covering bangs, one visible yellow eye, brass bell, side pouch, and huge fluffy tail stay readable at small size
